reviews.text:
We've photographed many micro-weddings at Mountain Wedding Garden - here's what you need to know! LOCATION - The venue is located very close to town and there's a large parking lot with the venue just steps away, so it's very convenient and accessible for guests. The outdoor ceremony space and pavilion are right next to each other, so it's a great option to have the full wedding in one location.

It has stunning mountain views for your outdoor ceremony, and a covered pavilion for your reception on-site. Plus- you'll be able to explore other viewpoints around Crested Butte for your newlywed photos as well!

PRIVACY - There is a playground and sports court nearby, but the ceremony site and reception pavilion are pretty tucked away from it, so you can expect privacy but just be aware it's not 100% secluded. We've never had a problem with noise or people wandering through the venue.

COST - This is the most affordable wedding venue you'll find. As of 2026, it starts at just $800 for a weekday ceremony at the garden, or $2k for ceremony and reception. This is part of the reason why this venue books up very fast! They have their calendar and full prices available online, making it very transparent and easy to book.

At Authentic Collective, we love photographing micro weddings at Mountain Wedding Garden! It's the perfect option for couples who want to get married with guests in Crested Butte.

the adorable garden and crested Butte is a beautiful place for over 100+ people. The amenities and beauty surrounding you in the garden and in the mountains is a really breathtaking in a beautiful place to get married. As a local photographer, it is wonderful to be at one venue and be able to have all of your locations you can shoot at as the views are never ending, no matter where you turn here.

Mountain Wedding Garden is one of the most beautiful wedding venues in Crested Butte, and over the years it's become one of our favorites!

The view for the ceremony site is absolutely beautiful. With a jaw-dropping backdrop and some seasonal highlights (wildflowers in the Summer, leaves changing in Fall), this is one of the venues that fully embodies a Rocky Mountain Wedding.

The reception space is a covered pavilion with an indoor/outdoor feel. Without having to worry about noise to disturb any nearby neighbors, we get to turn up the music and have a blast at every wedding!

We're honored to be one of the preferred wedding vendors, and if you're looking for a truly special space for your big day, look no further than Mountain Wedding Garden!

Considering a wedding at Mountain Wedding Garden in Crested Butte?  Here's what you need to know!

COST: This is truly one of the most affordable wedding venues in Colorado, starting at just $1500 for a weekday ceremony and reception. Which is crazy considering the beautiful views! Plus, there are no food and beverage minimums (since you'll need to provide that yourself) which saves you a lot.

GUEST COUNT: They allow up to 200 guests for the ceremony and 120 for the reception, but having been there in person that feels like a lot for the space. Up to 50 guests would be a much more comfortable number, especially for the reception pavilion.

THE SPACE: The venue itself is a short, easy walk from the parking lot. It's in close proximity to a playground and tennis courts but it's hidden away enough that there is enough privacy. There are also bathrooms onsite (real ones, not gross porta potties).

PHOTOS: The venue is surrounded by mountain views and is perfect for sunset newlywed portraits. However, you're also so close to tons of other epic trails and viewpoints we highly recommend visiting either before the ceremony or on another day for more photos. Hiring a photographer familiar with the area who knows the hidden gem locations and the best lighting times is key to getting the most out of this incredible location!

As photographers specializing in small weddings in the mountains, we've shot at tons of micro wedding venues in Colorado. However, Mountain Wedding Garden is one of our favorites!

Love this wedding venue!  As a photographer with Mountain Magic Media, we've photographed many weddings here, and they are always stunning!  The views are unmatched, and the amenities are wonderful.  The garden is always well-kept with lots of lovely flowers blooming throughout the season.  There is a covered pavilion area with a flat spot next to it that you can extend coverage by renting a tent.  The Wedding Garden rates are quite affordable too.
